title: Accident in Nelson Mandela Boulevard claims woman
description: GEORGE NEWS – A young woman lost her...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS – A young woman lost her life in a car accident on Nelson Mandela Boulevard early this morning, Monday 28 July.


> The crash allegedly occurred between the Total Garage and Boeta’s Corner, in the direction of Thembalethu, sometime between midnight and 01:00.


According to information received, two vehicles were involved.

More information will follow as it becomes available. Feedback on a media enquiry is awaited from the police.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
